name: Winvest Group Ltd
business: Winvest Group Ltd, through its subsidiary IQI Media Inc., operates a content technology studio and AI-driven media company. It offers a SaaS platform called Launchrr for cloud-based content distribution and aggregation to streaming platforms, and develops original intellectual property for media production. The company sells to filmmakers, content owners, and streaming platforms.

exposures.sentence: IQI Media, Inc is a content technology (ConTech) studio and Artificial Intelligent (AI) AI-driven media company focused on bridging storytelling with data-driven engagement.
